title: CHWY Stock Earnings: Chewy Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q4 2023
text: Chewy reported earnings per share of 18 cents for Q4 2023, beating the analyst estimate for EPS of -4 cents. The company reported revenue of $2.83 billion. This beat demonstrated the company's path to sustained profitability after years of losses. The strong Q4 result capped a fiscal 2023 full-year performance of 10% revenue growth to $11.15 billion. The earnings beat was driven by improved operational efficiency, higher autoship mix, and better-than-expected gross margins. Management highlighted its ability to gain market share while expanding margins simultaneously in a challenging macro environment. The results confirmed investor confidence that Chewy had successfully transitioned from a growth-at-all-costs model to a profitable, sustainable business.
